title: Enchantable Shears and Shields
description: Enchant shears and shields at enchantment tables, instead of only at anvils
body: ## Enchantment Tables Additions: - Shears can now receive Efficiency and Unbreaking - about 30% chance for eff 4 + unb 3, about 40% chance for eff 3 + unb 3 with level 30 enchant - Shields can now receive Unbreaking - will often give unbreaking 2, sometimes unbreaking 3 with level 30 enchant ## Anvils Anvil behavior is unchanged. - Shears can still receive Efficiency, Unbreaking, Mending, Curse of Vanishing, and Silk Touch - Silk Touch is buggy and weird, no special effect on shears - Sheilds can still receive Unbreaking, Mending, and Curse of Vanishing ## Issues and concerns If I missed any unenchantable but still anvil-able items or you have concerns about the enchantment levels or balance, open an issue on my Github repository
